explorer_major_001.title: Lie to the King
explorer_major_001.body: You can send the king a completely false report to hide the real situation. If it is exposed, you are finished. Do you lie?
explorer_major_001.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_001.outcome_yes_body: The lie reaches the throne. Game over.
explorer_major_001.outcome_no_body: You remain respectable in the king's eyes. Royal support returns to 50.

explorer_major_002.title: Push Too Far
explorer_major_002.body: Your men want to push farther into lands they do not control yet. Do you slow down this overly risky advance?
explorer_major_002.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_002.outcome_yes_body: You consolidate what matters most. Territories return to 50. For 12 cards, the card message appears without vowels.
explorer_major_002.outcome_no_body: You stretch yourself too thin. Controlled territories are cut in half. For 12 cards, the card message appears without vowels.

explorer_major_003.title: Lost Cargo
explorer_major_003.body: A large share of the riches that were found can still be saved, but only if you stop other operations. Do you secure the convoy?
explorer_major_003.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_003.outcome_yes_body: You save what matters most. Riches return to 50. For 12 cards, the choices appear without vowels.
explorer_major_003.outcome_no_body: You let too many losses slip away. Riches drop by half. For 12 cards, the choices appear without vowels.

explorer_major_004.title: Forced Conversions
explorer_major_004.body: Some want to convert the inhabitants through fear and coercion to move faster. Do you let them do it?
explorer_major_004.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_004.outcome_yes_body: You let fear rule. The converted population is cut in half. For 12 cards, the card message appears reversed.
explorer_major_004.outcome_no_body: You refuse this brutality and the converted population returns to 50. For 12 cards, the card message appears reversed.

explorer_major_005.title: Demand More from the King
explorer_major_005.body: You can ask the king for more help right away, but your case is still fragile. Do you press now?
explorer_major_005.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_005.outcome_yes_body: You ask too early. Royal support drops by half. For 12 cards, the choices appear reversed.
explorer_major_005.outcome_no_body: You hold back and keep the king's trust. Royal support returns to 50. For 12 cards, the choices appear reversed.

explorer_major_006.title: Go Beyond the Lines
explorer_major_006.body: You are promised vast new territories if you push farther without securing the rear. Do you push ahead?
explorer_major_006.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_006.outcome_yes_body: You lose what you already held. Territories are cut in half.
explorer_major_006.outcome_no_body: You stabilize what has already been gained. Territories return to 50.

explorer_major_007.title: Cursed Treasure
explorer_major_007.body: An expedition claims to have found immense wealth, but everything about it feels like a trap. Do you send everyone to recover it?
explorer_major_007.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_007.outcome_yes_body: You send too many men into a trap. Game over.
explorer_major_007.outcome_no_body: You refuse this mirage and riches return to 50.

explorer_major_008.title: Conversions for Show
explorer_major_008.body: Your men want to announce conversions they have not truly achieved. Do you let them inflate the numbers?
explorer_major_008.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_008.outcome_yes_body: The lie drains everything of meaning. The converted population drops by half.
explorer_major_008.outcome_no_body: You refuse false numbers. The converted population returns to 50.

explorer_major_009.title: Honest Report
explorer_major_009.body: Your results are more modest than expected. You can dress them up or send a solid and sincere report. Do you stay honest?
explorer_major_009.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_009.outcome_yes_body: You protect your standing with the king. Royal support returns to 50.
explorer_major_009.outcome_no_body: You weaken your credibility with the king. Royal support drops by half.

explorer_major_010.title: Take Without Counting
explorer_major_010.body: Your men want to strip an area of all its resources immediately. Do you hold them back?
explorer_major_010.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_010.outcome_yes_body: You avoid plunder and royal support returns to 50.
explorer_major_010.outcome_no_body: You let them do it and royal support drops by half.

explorer_major_011.title: Fort Too Isolated
explorer_major_011.body: You can keep a very exposed outpost just to show that you still hold the area. Do you keep it?
explorer_major_011.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_011.outcome_yes_body: You keep a post that means nothing. Territories drop by half.
explorer_major_011.outcome_no_body: You give up this useless symbol and territories return to 50.

explorer_major_012.title: The King's Share
explorer_major_012.body: You can send the king his exact share now, or hold back more for the expedition. Do you keep too much for yourself?
explorer_major_012.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_012.outcome_yes_body: The king's trust begins to crack. Useful riches drop by half.
explorer_major_012.outcome_no_body: You keep his support. Riches return to 50.

explorer_major_013.title: Religious Pressure
explorer_major_013.body: A missionary wants to speed up conversions through public obligation. Do you support him?
explorer_major_013.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_013.outcome_yes_body: You support pressure that turns the population against you. The converted population is cut in half.
explorer_major_013.outcome_no_body: You refuse this violence and the converted population returns to 50.

explorer_major_014.title: Send an Apology
explorer_major_014.body: The king doubts you. You can write to him honestly now, or wait with a more flattering report. Do you tell the truth?
explorer_major_014.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_014.outcome_yes_body: You save your link with the court. Royal support returns to 50.
explorer_major_014.outcome_no_body: Doubt settles in at court. Royal support drops by half.

explorer_major_015.title: Lines Too Stretched
explorer_major_015.body: Your groups are too spread out to hold their ground for long. Do you call them back to rebuild a stronger line?
explorer_major_015.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_015.outcome_yes_body: You return to something sustainable. Territories return to 50.
explorer_major_015.outcome_no_body: You keep stretching thinner. Territories are cut in half.

explorer_major_016.title: Impossible Promise to the King
explorer_major_016.body: You can promise the king a vast conquest before next season, but you know that is almost impossible. Do you promise it?
explorer_major_016.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_016.outcome_yes_body: Your promise grows beyond you and everything reaches the throne. Game over.
explorer_major_016.outcome_no_body: You remain credible. Royal support returns to 50.

explorer_major_017.title: Store the Gold
explorer_major_017.body: You can finally secure a large share of the riches, but that will slow several other operations. Do you secure it?
explorer_major_017.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_017.outcome_yes_body: You consolidate the loot. Riches return to 50.
explorer_major_017.outcome_no_body: You scatter everything and lose a lot. Riches drop by half.

explorer_major_018.title: Conversions Announced Too Soon
explorer_major_018.body: You are being urged to publicly announce a wave of conversions that are still very fragile. Do you refuse this rush?
explorer_major_018.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_018.outcome_yes_body: You stabilize things before announcing them. The converted population returns to 50.
explorer_major_018.outcome_no_body: You announce too soon and the converted population loses half its stability.

explorer_major_019.title: Request Reinforcements
explorer_major_019.body: You can ask the court for more help, but that will make you dependent on the king's goodwill. Do you ask anyway?
explorer_major_019.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_019.outcome_yes_body: You make a clean and sustainable request. Royal support returns to 50.
explorer_major_019.outcome_no_body: You let your credit melt away. Royal support drops by half.

explorer_major_020.title: Hold or Expand
explorer_major_020.body: You must choose between holding what you already have or expanding even farther. Do you choose consolidation?
explorer_major_020.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_020.outcome_yes_body: You give the colony real strength. Territories return to 50.
explorer_major_020.outcome_no_body: You expand without a strong enough base. Territories drop by half.

explorer_major_021.title: Plundering the Reserves
explorer_major_021.body: Your men want to take from the common reserves to enrich themselves quickly. Do you clearly forbid it?
explorer_major_021.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_021.outcome_yes_body: You forbid this plunder and riches return to 50.
explorer_major_021.outcome_no_body: You let the reserves run dry. Riches are cut in half.

explorer_major_022.title: Fear or Patience
explorer_major_022.body: A priest wants quick conversions through shows of force. Do you shut down that approach?
explorer_major_022.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_022.outcome_yes_body: You choose a less violent approach. The converted population returns to 50.
explorer_major_022.outcome_no_body: You create rejection instead of support. The converted population drops by half.

explorer_major_023.title: The King's Favor
explorer_major_023.body: The king wants proof of immediate results. You can send him something limited but real, or exaggerate your success. Do you stay real?
explorer_major_023.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_023.outcome_yes_body: You keep his support over time. Royal support returns to 50.
explorer_major_023.outcome_no_body: You damage your relationship with the court. Royal support drops by half.

explorer_major_024.title: Keep a Margin
explorer_major_024.body: You can keep political leverage with the king instead of asking him for everything right now. Do you keep that margin?
explorer_major_024.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_024.outcome_yes_body: You keep useful political leverage and royal support returns to 50.
explorer_major_024.outcome_no_body: You ask for everything too early and royal support drops by half.

explorer_major_025.title: Overly Optimistic Map
explorer_major_025.body: Your officers have drawn maps that are far more flattering than reality. Do you impose an accurate version?
explorer_major_025.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_025.outcome_yes_body: You start again from a real foundation. Territories return to 50.
explorer_major_025.outcome_no_body: You navigate inside a lie. Territories drop by half.

explorer_major_026.title: Transfer the Treasure
explorer_major_026.body: You can send a heavily loaded convoy to the homeland now, or wait until you have more. Do you send it?
explorer_major_026.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_026.outcome_yes_body: You secure part of the gains. Riches return to 50.
explorer_major_026.outcome_no_body: You wait too long and lose a lot. Riches are cut in half.

explorer_major_027.title: Conversion Through Terror
explorer_major_027.body: A captain wants to crush all local resistance through a very harsh display of force. Do you authorize it?
explorer_major_027.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_027.outcome_yes_body: You trigger a total break. Game over.
explorer_major_027.outcome_no_body: You avoid the worst and the converted population returns to 50.

explorer_major_028.title: Demand Answers from the Court
explorer_major_028.body: You can demand more support from the king, but the relationship is fragile. Do you raise your voice?
explorer_major_028.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_028.outcome_yes_body: You push too hard. Royal support drops by half.
explorer_major_028.outcome_no_body: You keep the relationship manageable. Royal support returns to 50.

explorer_major_029.title: Lines Too Long
explorer_major_029.body: Your checkpoints are too far apart. Do you abandon part of them so you can properly hold the rest?
explorer_major_029.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_029.outcome_yes_body: You hold less, but better. Territories return to 50.
explorer_major_029.outcome_no_body: You stubbornly press on and everything starts to crack. Territories drop by half.

explorer_major_030.title: Sell Everything Right Away
explorer_major_030.body: You can quickly unload a large share of the riches at a poor price to boost your numbers. Do you do it?
explorer_major_030.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_030.outcome_yes_body: You drain the value instead of building it. Riches drop by half.
explorer_major_030.outcome_no_body: You keep a real strategy. Riches return to 50.

explorer_major_031.title: Long-Term Timeframe
explorer_major_031.body: You can accept that conversions take time, or demand quick results at any cost. Do you accept the long-term path?
explorer_major_031.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_031.outcome_yes_body: You build something stronger. The converted population returns to 50.
explorer_major_031.outcome_no_body: You force things too quickly and everything becomes fragile. The converted population drops by half.

explorer_major_032.title: Last Letter to the King
explorer_major_032.body: You can still calm the king with a proper explanation, or keep lulling him with promises. Do you explain honestly?
explorer_major_032.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_032.outcome_yes_body: You save your link with the court. Royal support returns to 50.
explorer_major_032.outcome_no_body: The king's patience collapses. Royal support drops by half.

explorer_major_033.title: Rebuild the Line
explorer_major_033.body: Your positions are poorly chosen. You can fall back to start again properly, or pretend to hold. Do you fall back?
explorer_major_033.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_033.outcome_yes_body: You pull back to restart cleanly. Territories return to 50.
explorer_major_033.outcome_no_body: You pretend to hold and territories lose half their value.

explorer_major_034.title: Plundered Reserves
explorer_major_034.body: You discover that several men are diverting part of the riches that were found. Do you stop everything to recover what you can?
explorer_major_034.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_034.outcome_yes_body: You save a large share of the loot. Riches return to 50.
explorer_major_034.outcome_no_body: The losses keep piling up. Riches drop by half.

explorer_major_035.title: Win Hearts
explorer_major_035.body: You can seek the inhabitants' real support, or settle for surface obedience. Do you choose real support?
explorer_major_035.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_035.outcome_yes_body: You move slower, but better. The converted population returns to 50.
explorer_major_035.outcome_no_body: You create silent rejection. Royal support drops by half.

explorer_major_036.title: Support from the Court
explorer_major_036.body: You can send the court a modest but clean report, or wait for a great success that never comes. Do you send the report?
explorer_major_036.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_036.outcome_yes_body: You send a modest but solid report. Royal support returns to 50.
explorer_major_036.outcome_no_body: You wait too long and royal support drops by half.

explorer_major_037.title: Defend What Exists
explorer_major_037.body: You can stop all forward movement for a while to truly secure what you already hold. Do you commit to that choice?
explorer_major_037.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_037.outcome_yes_body: You finally lay solid foundations. Territories return to 50.
explorer_major_037.outcome_no_body: You keep advancing without securing the rear. Territories are cut in half.

explorer_major_038.title: Sell Too Fast
explorer_major_038.body: The port demands immediate cargo shipments. You can give in to urgency or better develop what you have found. Do you give in?
explorer_major_038.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_038.outcome_yes_body: You sacrifice the true value. Riches lose half their strength.
explorer_major_038.outcome_no_body: You move slower but better. Riches return to 50.

explorer_major_039.title: Empty Speech
explorer_major_039.body: You are being offered a grand religious speech that sounds beautiful but is completely empty in reality. Do you give it?
explorer_major_039.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_039.outcome_yes_body: You feed an empty façade. The converted population drops by half.
explorer_major_039.outcome_no_body: You refuse this hollow speech and the converted population returns to 50.

explorer_major_040.title: Final Deception
explorer_major_040.body: You can still buy a little more time with the king by presenting a spectacular fake success. But if it reaches him, everything stops. Do you try it?
explorer_major_040.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
explorer_major_040.outcome_yes_body: The deception reaches the crown. Game over.
explorer_major_040.outcome_no_body: You refuse the final lie. Royal support returns to 50.
